label: Text
summary: Returns static text or file-like content from endpoint configuration. This handler can be used to expose text with a mimetype, but also for other types of files like a PDF converted to base64 or other files up to 1Mega. Optionally, add `custom_data.fileName` if it requires to be downloadable.

configuration.code: Raw text content returned by the endpoint.
configuration.custom_data: TEXT handler configuration such as custom_data.mimeType.
